Class BaitItem

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.fishing.services.bait.BaitItem
public class BaitItem extends Object
Utility class for creating bait items and identifying bait projectiles.

Bait items and the snowball projectiles they launch are tagged using a PersistentDataContainer with the key sylphian:bait_type, storing the bait ID as a string.

  • Method Details

    • create

      public static org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack create(BaitConfig config, org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin)
      Creates a bait ItemStack tagged with the bait ID in its persistent data.
      Parameters:
      config - the bait configuration to build the item from
      plugin - the plugin instance for the namespaced key
      Returns:
      the built and tagged ItemStack

    • getBaitId

      public static String getBaitId(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item, org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin)
      Reads the bait ID from an ItemStack's persistent data.
      Parameters:
      item - the item to check
      plugin - the plugin instance for the namespaced key
      Returns:
      the bait ID, or null if the item is not a bait

    • getBaitId

      public static String getBaitId(org.bukkit.entity.Projectile projectile, org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin)
      Reads the bait ID from a projectile's persistent data.
      Parameters:
      projectile - the projectile to check
      plugin - the plugin instance for the namespaced key
      Returns:
      the bait ID, or null if not a bait projectile

    • tagProjectile

      public static void tagProjectile(org.bukkit.entity.Projectile projectile, String baitId, org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin)
      Tags a projectile with a bait ID in its persistent data.
      Parameters:
      projectile - the projectile to tag
      baitId - the bait ID to store
      plugin - the plugin instance for the namespaced key
